Metadata.title: Flow Inc. — AI & Product Engineering, Built End to End
Metadata.description: Flow is a small global engineering team that ships AI products, web apps, and mobile apps end-to-end. We partner with operating companies as an embedded technical team led by founder Masanobu Minami.

Hero.heading: AI that drives the business.
Hero.subtitleLead: Through product engineering, AI training, and technical advisory, we turn AI into a real business driver.
Hero.subtitleSupport: Backed by Flow's small, senior team that uses AI in our own work, every day.

Capabilities.heading: Three core services
Capabilities.description: Product engineering, AI training, and technical advisory — three end-to-end services that take your AI initiatives from concept to production.

engineering.title: Product Engineering
engineering.description: Web, mobile, and AI applications, built and shipped end-to-end. Our specialty is generative AI integration and voice agents, but we deliver the full stack — with or without AI.
engineering.feature1: Generative AI integration (LLM, Agent, RAG, MCP)
engineering.feature2: Voice AI agents and ML model development
engineering.feature3: Web and mobile apps — with or without AI

training.title: AI Training & Consulting
training.description: Help your team make AI part of daily operations. Through hands-on coaching centered on Claude Code, we walk teams from AI fundamentals through to building tools that directly serve the business.

advisory.title: Technical Advisory
advisory.description: Sit alongside your team as a fractional product/tech partner. From requirements and architecture to vendor decisions and digital transformation strategy.

Work.heading: What we've shipped
Work.description: A selection of recent engagements, anonymized. All are live in production or active development.

voice.title: AI English Conversation App
voice.description: Conversational English-learning product for Japanese learners — practice speaking in real time with AI partners powered by ElevenLabs ConvAI. Lessons, progress tracking, and billing built end-to-end.

data.title: AI POS Analytics Platform
data.description: Analytics SaaS that lets retail teams interrogate POS data in natural language. An interactive SQL agent built on Google ADK composes BigQuery queries on the fly and surfaces insights as Vega-Lite charts.

video.title: AI Avatar Video Generation Platform
video.description: Pipeline that pairs HeyGen avatar generation with ElevenLabs TTS to produce branching AI dialogue videos from Q&A scripts. Generated flows ship as drop-in widgets — any site embeds with a single tag — with view analytics and conversion tracking baked in.

edu.title: Study-abroad Media Platform
edu.description: Content platform and lead workflow for an international education brand, delivered as a custom WordPress theme spanning multiple regional properties (Japan, Malta, etc.).

ecom.title: Corporate & E-commerce Site
ecom.description: Full corporate website and inquiry/quote workflow for a B2B service company, with SEO-tuned performance.

Founder.heading: A small global team
Founder.description: Specialists from around the world, each with deep domain expertise — assembled into the right team for every project. We move with the speed and decisiveness only a small team can, putting modern AI and web technologies to work in production.
Founder.name: Masanobu Minami
Founder.bio: Over a decade building consumer products end-to-end as engineer, PM, and board director at a growth-stage startup. Brings that operating experience to AI and product development — from problem framing through architecture, all the way to a shipped product.
Founder.principle1: Hands-on at the core — Masa or a senior member is directly involved in the central design and key technical decisions on every engagement.
Founder.principle2: Small by design — implementation is composed per-project from a trusted network of engineers, designers, and PMs.
Founder.principle3: Production-grade by default — we ship for real operation, not for a PoC graveyard.
Founder.principle4: Tech choices fit the business — including AI, technology is selected for the constraints and trajectory of the company we're working with.

Stack.heading: The technology we ship with
Stack.description: Models, infrastructure, and tooling we use day-to-day to take projects from prototype to production.

Products.heading: We use what we ship
Products.description: Internal products we build and operate ourselves. They keep our practice sharp and pressure-test the recommendations we give clients.

compare.title: AI Model Comparison & Selection
compare.description: Side-by-side evaluation of generative models across quality, latency, and cost — used internally for vendor decisions.

ops.title: Operations SaaS
ops.description: An internal-tooling-grade platform for operating teams in a specific industry, currently in deployment with live customers.

Contact.heading: Let's talk about your project.
Contact.description: Tell us what you're trying to ship, train, or solve. Masa reads every message and replies within one business day.
Contact.conversationDescription: We listen first, then sketch concrete next steps. No pitch decks, no pressure.
Contact.messagePlaceholder: What are you trying to build, train, or figure out?
Contact.successMessage: Thanks — your message is on its way. You'll hear from Masa shortly.
Contact.errorMessage: Sending failed. Please try again or email hello@flow-inc.ai directly.

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.messageMin: Message must be at least 10 characters

Footer.address: 8F Wind Ebisu Building, 2-4-8 Ebisu-nishi, Shibuya-ku, Tokyo 150-0021, Japan

SecurityPolicy.title: Information Security Policy
SecurityPolicy.intro: Flow Inc. (hereinafter referred to as "the Company") establishes and implements the following Information Security Policy (hereinafter referred to as "this Policy") to protect its information assets from all threats and to meet the trust and expectations of its customers and all related parties.

section1.title: Purpose
section1.body: The purpose of this Policy is to maintain the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of the information assets handled in the Company's business activities, and to prevent information security incidents.

section2.title: Scope
section2.body: This Policy applies to all directors and employees of the Company, all related parties including subcontractors engaged in the Company's business, and all information assets handled by the Company.

section3.title: Basic Commitments
section3.body: The Company will implement the following commitments to ensure information security.
items: Comply with laws, governmental guidelines, and other standards related to information security.
Implement necessary safety management measures to appropriately protect information assets from risks such as unauthorized access, loss, destruction, falsification, and leakage.
Regularly review and evaluate the implementation status of information security measures, and continuously improve them.
Conduct education and awareness activities related to information security to raise the information security awareness of directors and employees.
In the event of an information security incident, promptly investigate the cause, minimize damage, and work to prevent recurrence.

section4.title: Implementation Structure
section4.body: The Representative Director serves as the Information Security Manager and is responsible for the appropriate management of information assets and the implementation of this Policy.

section5.title: Obligations of Employees
section5.body: All directors and employees shall comply with this Policy and related regulations and procedures, and endeavor to handle information assets appropriately.

section6.title: Management of Subcontractors
section6.body: When outsourcing business operations, the Company shall verify the information security level of subcontractors and, as necessary, clarify information security obligations through contracts.

section7.title: Continuous Improvement
section7.body: The Company shall periodically review and continuously improve this Policy in response to changes in the information security environment, business content, and information security risks.
